metrics.name: academorix.transaction.created_total
metrics.description: Number of transaction rows created (status='draft', pre-post). Rate signal for money-movement volume.

metrics.name: academorix.transaction.posted_total
metrics.description: Number of transactions transitioned to status='posted' (ledger balanced + committed). The primary success metric.

metrics.name: academorix.transaction.reversed_total
metrics.description: Every reversal transaction created (from all four reversal_reason values). refund/chargeback are expected volumes; error_correction/accounting_adjustment should be near-zero + spikes are ops signals.

metrics.name: academorix.transaction.amendment_requested_total
metrics.description: Every manual reversal via POST /transactions/{id}/reverse. Regulator-critical — ANY non-zero rate is a signal to investigate + review the ops workflow.

metrics.name: academorix.transaction.create_duration_ms
metrics.description: TransactionObserver.creating latency (advisory-lock acquire + validation + insert). Should stay < 100ms P99. Cross-currency transactions add ~200ms for the ExchangeRateResolver call.

metrics.name: academorix.transaction.post_duration_ms
metrics.description: TransactionObserver::finalize() latency (SUM(debits) == SUM(credits) check + status transition). Should stay < 50ms P99.

metrics.name: academorix.ledger.entries_recorded_total
metrics.description: side = 'debit' or 'credit'. Number of ledger entries recorded per account per side. Every transaction contributes at least one debit + one credit.

metrics.name: academorix.ledger.entry_amount_cents
metrics.description: Distribution of ledger entry amounts. Helps ops identify unusual movements (e.g. a $1M refund is worth reviewing manually).

metrics.name: academorix.ledger.imbalances_detected_total
metrics.description: CRITICAL. Every increment triggers PagerDuty P0. scope='per_transaction' (transaction-level imbalance at post time) / 'per_account_daily' (nightly reconciler) / 'global_tenant' (nightly reconciler). detected_by='observer' / 'reconciler_nightly' / 'reconciler_manual'. Should stay at 0.

metrics.name: academorix.ledger.reconciliation_runs_total
metrics.description: outcome='balanced' / 'imbalanced'. Number of ReconcileLedgerBalancesJob completions. Regulator-facing SLA — one 'balanced' run per tenant per day.

metrics.name: academorix.ledger.reconciliation_duration_ms
metrics.description: Per-tenant reconciler run duration. Larger tenants naturally take longer; alert on P99 > 15 min (indicates a fanout / lock-contention issue).

metrics.name: academorix.ledger.account_balance_cents
metrics.description: Current running balance per account per regulator category. Gauge — updated on every ledger entry write.

metrics.name: academorix.ledger.threshold_crossings_total
metrics.description: watermark_kind='high_watermark' / 'low_watermark'. Number of AccountBalanceThresholdCrossed fires. Signals ops to review + potentially raise/lower the threshold in tenant settings.

metrics.name: academorix.transaction.halt_flag_active
metrics.description: Current count of tenants with transaction_halt_new=true. Should stay near 0 in a healthy system. Every non-zero tenant is a P0 investigation.

metrics.name: academorix.transaction.exchange_rate_lookups_total
metrics.description: hit_or_miss='cache_hit' / 'cache_miss' / 'provider_success' / 'provider_failure'. Signal for cache effectiveness + provider health.

metrics.name: academorix.transaction.exchange_rate_provider_duration_ms
metrics.description: Per-provider exchange-rate lookup latency. openexchangerates typically < 500ms P99; ecb_daily is a local file lookup + should be < 20ms.

metrics.name: academorix.transaction.currency_converted_total
metrics.description: Number of TransactionCurrencyConverted fires. Signal for cross-currency transaction volume.

metrics.name: academorix.transaction.retention_purged_total
metrics.description: Number of transactions purged by PurgeExpiredTransactionDataJob after archive-to-compliance. Cumulative — sums lifetime purges.

metrics.name: academorix.transaction.archive_export_bytes
metrics.description: Bytes exported to compliance-storage by the retention pipeline. Signal for storage-cost forecasting.

metrics.name: academorix.transaction.report_generated_total
metrics.description: outcome='success' / 'failure' / 'skipped_no_entitlement'. format='csv' / 'jsonl' / 'json'. Number of GenerateGeneralLedgerReportJob completions.

metrics.name: academorix.transaction.entitlement.gate_refusals_total
metrics.description: Route hits refused by the entitlement middleware. Product signal for upgrade-CTA impressions on transaction_multi_currency + transaction_advanced_reporting + transaction_ledger_reconciliation_api.
